title: Proverb of The Temporal Intensity Blade

story.text: # 📜 Proverb of The Temporal Intensity Blade
> The needle that pierces the same point forty-two times does not merely make a hole; it weaves a knot so tight that the wind itself cannot find a way through.
— inscribed on [[The Temporal Intensity Blade]]  ·  *The Polished Key*
